flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Keystone College fell 27% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1k → 771).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Keystone College fell 24% between 2021 and 2024 (36.0% → 27.3%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 23% at Keystone College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (870 vs 1.1k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Keystone College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (63.9% → 57.2%).
